policy.note: Asked once on first run (FEAT-001). No design tool holds these screens and the repo (shadcn/ui + tokens) is the design surface; screens are specified code-native in each feature's ui-design.md. Overridable per screen; switch to generate/register by connecting a design-tool MCP and re-running (re-verification registers tool designs after the fact).

SCR-WEB-002.name: Verify Email — Notice
SCR-WEB-002.notes: Arrival state binds to POST /auth/register (201). The Resend action powering the resend-sent and rate-limited states binds to POST /auth/verify/resend, owned by FEAT-002 (not in FEAT-001's technical-design); this entry's bindings will be updated when FEAT-002 designs that endpoint.
